summary.shape_sentence: Strong opening drive into late-morning highs, followed by broad midday/afternoon rotation and a modest late fade into a still-bullish close.

goat.note: Opening drive from roughly 27635 into the 27885-27900 zone was the standout move of the session.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels on the provided RTH frame; bearish pivots inferred at repeated upper-zone rejections.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels on the provided RTH frame; bullish pivots inferred at pullback lows around 27755 and 27800-27815.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; inferred supply around 27885-27910 was repeatedly respected.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; inferred demand around 27800-27815 held through afternoon rotation.

time_markers.10am_blue: Extended near the opening-drive high around 27880-27900 after a sharp upside impulse.
time_markers.12pm_red: Rotating below the late-morning high near 27850-27870 with momentum slowing.
time_markers.2pm_green: Holding upper balance near 27870-27890 but failing to create clean continuation.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 27836.75 after a late fade, still bullish versus the RTH open.

takeaway: Bullish opening-drive reference day where the real opportunity came early, then price spent the rest of RTH balancing below supply. Comparable to a trend-open / balance-after-drive session with defended afternoon demand and a late fade that did not erase the bullish close.
